g.text: What does this extension talk to?
read SKILL.md + lock files → one TreeView.
What: See all skills across Claude, Copilot,
Cursor — not buried in 11 separate dirs.
Why: Devs use multiple agents in 2026.
No tool unified the view until this.
Cause: skills.sh symlinks into each agent's
dir, but each has its own path convention.
How: Trees API returns full repo file tree in
1 call. We compare each skill folder's "tree
SHA" (a Git hash of a folder's exact contents
— changes if any file inside changes).
What: Update checking — 18 skills from 1 repo
= 1 API call, not 18. Batched by source repo.
Why: skills.sh check-updates API had a branch
mismatch bug. We bypass it, hitting GitHub
Cause: Lock file stores each skill's tree SHA
at install time. Compare vs current → detect
We scrape 3 pages with regex to get:
